summary.lv: Grafton Latvia klients (strauji augošs SaaS uzņēmums) meklē Digital Learning Manager, kas izstrādās un vadīs digitālo mācību stratēģiju klientiem un iekšējām komandām.
summary.en: A Grafton Latvia client (fast-growing SaaS company) is hiring a Digital Learning Manager to design and run the digital learning strategy for both customers and internal teams.
